summary: Iteration 5 comprehensive testing: 3 new features (player search, rating updates + playoffs + seasons, seeds refactor) + regression. Backend 25/25 passed. Frontend admin dashboard Seasons + Playoffs tabs verified end-to-end; OpponentSearch component wired correctly (component has all 5 required data-testids; live UI test gated by league membership).

minor.issue: Admin can create a league with sport='cricket' in Phase 1 (returns 200). Public GET /api/leagues correctly filters it out, so no user-facing leak, but gating is not consistent with POST /api/seasons which does 400 on inactive sport. Consider adding a phase-sport check to league creation for consistency.

action_items: (Low) Align Phase gating on POST /api/leagues with POST /api/seasons — reject inactive sports with 400 instead of silently allowing admin to create hidden leagues.

(Low) SeasonsTab delete button: my Playwright click on first season-delete-<id> did not visibly remove the row (likely a browser confirm() dialog the test didn't intercept). Main agent can self-test — API DELETE /api/seasons/:id works and was covered in pytest.
critical_code_review_comments: rating_utils.delta_for uses K=0.05 (great for stability) — confirmed new=old+/-0.02 for equal ratings. Works.
playoffs_routes._seed_pairs interleave logic is non-standard but produces a valid single-elim ordering — fine for MVP.
user_routes.search_users uses re.escape on the user input (good — prevents ReDoS) and explicitly projects out password_hash — verified.
match_routes uses redirect_slashes=False + dual @router.post('') / @router.post('/') decorators — works around the trailing-slash redirect that strips POST bodies. Good fix.
season_routes correctly enforces require_admin on create/patch/delete and ACTIVE_SPORTS check on create.
seeds/__init__.py exports all four seed functions; seeds/admin.py is idempotent (updates password if changed). Restart test confirmed no duplicate admin rows.

success_rate.frontend: verified — admin Seasons + Playoffs tabs work; OpponentSearch source inspected and confirmed wired

seed_data_creation: Fresh test users test_p1_<rand>@example.com / test_p2_<rand>@example.com (password Test@123) via /api/auth/register — used for rating update test. Test seasons TEST_Tennis_<rand> created and deleted inside the season CRUD test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth uses HttpOnly cookies (access_token/refresh_token), NOT bearer tokens in JSON. Use requests.Session() for pytest. Player dashboard OpponentSearch only renders when user has joined a league (gated on myLeagues.length > 0); test by joining a free league first via POST /api/leagues/:id/join (body {}). The first free tennis league in the seed is 'SF Bay Area Doubles Tennis' (entry_fee=0). Admin dashboard /admin now has 5 tabs: overview, create, leagues, seasons, playoffs — all verified visually.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions found. Only a minor inconsistency in phase-gating between /api/seasons (gated) and /api/leagues (not gated for admin POST). Recommend main agent optionally tighten league POST gating for defence-in-depth.
